text:
STANDARD OPERATING PROCEDURE
Equipment: Generator GEN-3
Document No: SOP-012
Hazard Level: HIGH

1. PURPOSE
This procedure describes the lockout/tagout and inspection steps required before
performing maintenance on the Generator GEN-3.

2. REQUIRED PPE
Technicians must wear the following before beginning work: hard hat, hearing protection, arc-flash suit.

3. PROCEDURE
   Step 1: Isolate energy source and verify zero energy state.
   Step 2: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.
   Step 3: Verify guard and enclosure are reinstalled before re-energizing.
   Step 4: Test emergency stop function.
   Step 5: Verify guard and enclosure are reinstalled before re-energizing.
   Step 6: Torque check all fasteners to manufacturer spec.
   Step 7: Test emergency stop function.
   Step 8: Check lubrication levels and top off per spec sheet.
   Step 9: Record readings in the CMMS work order.

4. NOTES
Deviations from this procedure must be logged and approved by the maintenance supervisor.

ground_truth.required_ppe: hard hat, hearing protection, arc-flash suit
